payload.title: EEO Report – 4th Quarter 2022
payload.description: NYCT Diversity/EEO Report for the 4th Quarter 2022, including workforce demographics, new hires and separations, and EEO discrimination complaints.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: NYCT's workforce consisted of 47,076 employees as of December 31, 2022

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority Department of Diversity and Civil Rights

payload.entity_name: Metropolitan Transportation Authority Department of Diversity and Civil Rights

tool_args.label: NYCT Total Workforce as of December 31, 2022

payload.raw_value_text: NYCT's 4th Quarter workforce increased by 346 employees

tool_args.label: NYCT Female Net Change Employees Q4
NYCT Minority Net Change Employees Q4

payload.raw_value_text: 119 employees who self identified as veterans hired

tool_args.label: NYCT Female Percentage Increase vs Q3 2022

payload.raw_value_text: The percentage of females employed in the workforce increased by 1% when compared to 3rd Quarter 2022

tool_args.label: NYCT Minority Percentage Increase vs Q3 2022

payload.raw_value_text: The percentage of minorities in the workforce increased by 1% when compared to 3rd Quarter 2022
The net change for females was a positive 568 employees
The net change for males was a positive 889 employees
The net change for self identified veterans was a positive 26 male employees
The net change for minorities was a positive 1,663 employees
The net change for non-minorities was a negative 206 employees
The net change for self identified veterans was a positive 35 employees
67 EEO complaints were filed citing 147 separate bases
16 Title VI and related discrimination complaints were filed citing 22 separate bases

payload.missing_information: All utilization goals will require recalculation due to employee movements from transformation
payload.gap_text: Due to employee movements, resulting from the transformation, all utilization goals will require recalculation to be provided later.
